overall.description: A cinematic nighttime drone shot from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the General Quincy T. Harris monument in Saint Denis. The camera begins at ground level reading the monument inscription, rises to reveal a vandalized equestrian statue with 'COWARD' painted on the horse, then ascends further to showcase the full historic courtyard surrounded by gas-lit brick buildings.

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the monument base to read the inscription

entered.detail: stone pedestal with General Quincy T. Harris inscription
tropical palm trees lining the courtyard path
tropical palm trees lining the courtyard path
ornate cast-iron gas street lamp emitting warm yellow light
three-story brick building with arched windows and dormers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves at ground level through a quiet historic courtyard at night, approaching a stone monument base surrounded by palm trees and illuminated by warm gas lamps. The inscription 'General Quincy T. Harris' becomes legible as the camera nears the pedestal.

events.description: camera rises above the monument base revealing the equestrian statue atop the pedestal
white painted graffiti reading 'COWARD' becomes visible on the horse's flank

agents.ego_description: rising upward and circling the statue to examine the vandalized monument from multiple angles

entered.detail: bronze statue of General Harris on horseback with sword raised
white painted text 'COWARD' vandalized on the horse's side

segments.scene_description: As the camera ascends, it reveals the full equestrian statue atop the monument, prominently displaying the word 'COWARD' painted in white on the horse. The camera circles the statue, showing the surrounding gas-lit courtyard and the historic brick architecture from a rising aerial perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of historic French Quarter courtyard

events.description: camera reaches high aerial altitude providing full overview of the plaza and surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: circling high above the courtyard to showcase the complete layout of the historic plaza and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: three-story brick building with wraparound balconies and illuminated windows
landscaped garden beds and pathways of the plaza

segments.scene_description: From a high aerial vantage point, the camera circles the entire courtyard, revealing the full scope of the historic plaza with its gas lamps, palm trees, and surrounding three-story brick buildings. The vandalized statue appears small in the lower right as the view expands to show the complete architectural ensemble.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins as an intimate close-up of a monument and ascends into a sweeping aerial vista of a historic nighttime plaza. It begins at ground level, gliding through a quiet courtyard illuminated by warm gas lamps and palm trees until the inscription for General Quincy T. Harris becomes legible on a stone pedestal. As the camera rises, the perspective shifts to reveal an equestrian statue atop the monument, prominently displaying the word COWARD painted in white across the horse. The scene then expands into a high aerial circle, pulling away from the vandalized statue to showcase the full scope of the plaza. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal the surrounding three-story brick buildings and the architectural ensemble of the gas-lit square from a distant vantage point.
